parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [ { parts: [ { text: `You are a lead qualification and personalization engine for shersial.com. shersial.com delivers high-end, Awwwards-level Webflow and Brutalist-Modernist UI/UX design for premium brands and well-funded startups. Ideal customer profile: a funded startup or premium brand that just launched on Product Hunt but likely has a generic, templated, or outdated website that does not match a high-end aesthetic, or companies in luxury and premium niches such as lifestyle, hospitality, sports, real estate, or enterprise SaaS needing a standout design. Evaluate this Product Hunt launch. Title: ${$json.title} Description: ${$json.content} Link: ${$json.link} If this looks like a funded or notable launch that could benefit from a premium Webflow or Brutalist-Modernist redesign, output ONLY a valid JSON object (double-quoted keys and string values, no markdown fences) with fields: qualified set to true, score from 1 to 10, company_name if detectable else null, pain_point as one sentence describing the likely design gap, personalized_audit as a concise constructive roast plus pitch for a shersial.com premium redesign in max 3 sentences ready to send, suggested_subject as an email subject line, email as a contact email address only if one is explicitly written in the post text else null, missing_info as anything else needed or null. If this does not fit, output ONLY a JSON object with qualified set to false and no other fields.` } ] } ] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO leads (agent, score, company_name, platform, pain_point, personalized_audit, suggested_subject, email, source_url) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9) ON CONFLICT (source_url, agent) DO NOTHING
